mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in labor costs signals a tightening monetary policy that compresses aggregate demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decrease in the labor force participation rate signals a weakening labor market that compresses aggregate supply, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).
